top_findings.summary: The skill requests excessive OAuth token scopes for its stated read-only RCA purpose. For GitHub, it requires the "repo" scope (which includes full read/write access to all repositories) when only read access is needed. For GitLab, it requires both "api" (full read/write API access) and "read_repository" scopes, when "read_repository" alone would suffice for the described read-only operations. This constitutes over-collection of permissions that could allow unintended write operations if the tokens are compromised.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests excessive OAuth token scopes for its stated read-only RCA purpose. For GitHub, it requires the "repo" scope (which includes full read/write access to all repositories) when only read access is needed. For GitLab, it requires both "api" (full read/write API access) and "read_repository" scopes, when "read_repository" alone would suffice for the described read-only operations. This constitutes over-collection of permissions that could allow unintended write operations if the tokens are compromised.
